title: Incombustium
description: Have you ever lost your items in a tragic accident? I have a solution!
body:
### So, lost items huh?
*What'd you lose it to, because I bet I have a solution for each one!*

Lava? Fire? Explosions? **Cacti?** Well then you should find the **Incombustible** Enchantment, a super rare enchantment that protects your item from any of those fates!

You just can't find it? The **Spectral** Enchantment will make your items glow through walls when dropped!

Perhaps you just can't get to it in time, well then go find **Everlasting**, an enchantment that for every level of said enchantment, will add five minutes to the despawn timer! (Stacks to 3)
##
### Of Course With Every Great Thing...
*Comes with something bad.*

And that's why this mod also adds three curses!

The curse of **Time** will make your item despawn much quicker than others, *being lost to the sands of time itself...*

The **Gravitation** curse will make your item unafflicted by gravity, floating lighter than a feather wherever it wishes.

The curse of **Clumsy** will make your item rather slippery, and result in a chance to drop the said item if it's equipped and you are hit.
##
Some items are also inflammable or incombustible by default, and you can add to these lists via the use of a datapack, learn more about that [here](https://github.com/dev-slayer/Incombustium/wiki/Datapack-Tutorial)!
